blockers_encountered.description: FathomDB open/ingest failed: scheduler error. The Rust engine raised SchedulerError during or after ingest_with_extractor. The ELPS harness ran to completion (all 100 docs processed, 19 failed due to JSON truncation from max_tokens=2048 limit); the scheduler error occurred inside the engine when committing the extracted entity/edge data.
blockers_encountered.resolution: UNRESOLVED — FathomDB arm skipped. Per §11 guardrail: no Rust changes in this slice. Escalated as a Rust-level blocker requiring investigation in a follow-on slice (possible cause: async write queue overload from large entity/edge batch).

blockers_encountered.description: 19 of 100 docs failed ELPS entity extraction: LLM JSON response truncated at max_tokens=2048. The claude-haiku model generates entity-rich extraction JSON exceeding 2048 tokens for log-format documents (bahmutov_dailylogs: daily tool/package references generate 100+ entity mentions). 81 docs extracted successfully.
blockers_encountered.resolution: PARTIAL — 81/100 docs extracted. Increase max_tokens (e.g. 4096) or truncate input documents for future runs. Does not block pipeline validation (documented as known limitation).

blockers_encountered.description: mem0ai (or its LLM+embedding backend) is not available locally. Mem0 arm skipped.
blockers_encountered.resolution: UNRESOLVED — install mem0ai + configure a local backend.

blockers_encountered.description: No LLM answerer configured (R2_RUN/R2_ANSWERER_* unset). Retrieval-only run; recall_at_k reported, answerer_accuracy is null.
blockers_encountered.resolution: Expected for Option 2 pipeline validation run. Set R2_ANSWERER_BASE_URL + R2_ANSWERER_MODEL + R2_RUN=1 for full accuracy metrics.

note: Option 2 integration test — numbers are not benchmark-significant (N=100 corpus sample, LLM-generated gold). Validates ELPS→graph→R2 pipeline end-to-end. FathomDB arm blocked by Rust engine SchedulerError (ingest_with_extractor); per §11 guardrail, Rust not patched — escalated as blocker. Pipeline otherwise validated: (1) ELPS harness spoke fathomdb.extract.v1 protocol correctly (hello/ready + extract/result loop); (2) gold_gen.py produced 141 memory-class queries (32 temporal, 48 multi_hop, 27 knowledge_update, 34 multi_session); (3) extra-gold merge in R2Harness works; (4) naive_rag recall_at_k is non-null for all three go/no-go classes: temporal=0.8125, multi_hop=0.7083, knowledge_update=0.7037 — confirming the memory-class gold is valid and retrievable (§0 DoD: non-null recall_at_k for ≥2 memory classes, met for all 3). FathomDB scheduler error requires follow-on Rust investigation before Option 3 can run with graph arm active.
